title: Normalize backend error handling — typed throws instead of silent swallow
description: PRD §3 gap: backends silently swallow errors without typed throws. Audit all backend catch blocks (especially OPFSBackend and AgenticStoreBackend). Ensure every caught error is either: (a) wrapped in NotFoundError/PermissionDeniedError/IOError and re-thrown, or (b) explicitly logged with context. No empty catch blocks. Verify error consistency matches the StorageBackend interface contract. Target: PRD §3 gap 'backends silently swallow errors without typed throws'.
